flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Fort Peck Community College fell 60% between 2006 and 2009 (17.6% → 7.1%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Fort Peck Community College are 44% below 6-year earnings ($26.3k → $14.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Fort Peck Community College fell 39% between 2021 and 2024 (462 → 282).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Fort Peck Community College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (37.8% → 30.2%).
